action_group_id.description: The ID of the action group to use when the metric alert is triggered.

auto_mitigate.description: Indicates whether to automatically resolve the alert when the condition is no longer met.

criteria.description: The criteria that determine when the metric alert is triggered.
criteria.type: list(object({metric_name: string, metric_namespace: string, operator: string, threshold: number, aggregation: string}))

description.description: A detailed description of the metric alert.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the metric alert is enabled or disabled.

frequency.description: The frequency with which the metric alert is evaluated, in ISO 8601 format.

name.description: The name of the metric alert.

scopes.description: A list of resource IDs that the alert is scoped to.

severity.description: The severity level of the alert, typically a number from 0 to 4.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs to assign tags to the metric alert.

window_size.description: The time window size in which the metric alert is evaluated, in ISO 8601 format.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
